items.raw_desc: Mellbimbó krém Mommy Care - Lanolin szoptatós krém 40 ml:Research shows that one of the main reasons why a mother stops breastfeeding in the first weeks after giving birth is the pain caused by sore and cracked nipples. Lanolin Breastfeeding Ointment from Mommy Care is made from high quality pure lanolin and can help relieve irritation caused by cracked nipples. The product is vegan and has not been tested on animals. In addition, it is free of parabens, petrochemicals and phthalates. No scent. Use: Apply a sufficient amount to sore or cracked nipples after each breastfeeding. Lanolin is recommended to be applied before showering to protect the nipples from water drying them out. It does not need to be removed before breastfeeding. For ideal results, start applying a small amount of Lanolin to your nipples twice a day for 2 weeks before delivery.
